arts.ttl: Wilfried Zaha could leave Lyon in the January transfer window
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Wilfried Zaha (31) could leave Olympique Lyonnais as soon as the January transfer window after a difficult start to life at the Groupama Stadium. The former Crystal Palace…

arts.ttl: Preview: Lyon vs. Saint-Etienne - prediction, team news, lineups
